title: DPI-C issue with 64 bit data types when compiled on a 64-bit linux machine

features.name: dpi_c_64bit_output_parameter
features.description: Code should include a DPI-C import task declaration with a 64-bit bit type output parameter
features.snippet: import "DPI-C" task CMRead64(input int regnum, input int address, output bit [63:0] rdata);
